title: Light Kenyan Peas Grill
description: A simple, plant‑based grilled dish featuring peas, veggies, and a splash of soy sauce for a bright, springy flavor.
instructions: Heat the tava‑griddle over medium heat until shimmering.
Toss frozen peas with sesame oil, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper until coated.
Spread peas in a single layer on the heated griddle and cook for 3 minutes without stirring to develop a golden crust.
Flip the peas and add diced onion, bell pepper, and tomatoes, sprinkling soy sauce over the mixture.
Cook for another 4 minutes, stirring occasionally, until vegetables soften and peas are hot.
Remove from heat, sprinkle chopped cilantro, and squeeze a squeeze of lime if desired.
Serve immediately as a light lunch or side dish.
